description: Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Memphis, Tennessee.
